messages.text: Basket 1: a mouse/rat-shaped wicker basket with a pointed snout (little dark nose) and a small bead-like eye—no handle, like a sculptural animal body.
Placed it. Go to Basket 2.
Basket 2: a deep, round bucket-style wicker basket with a thick dark-brown arched handle and a lighter band around the rim near the top.
Is the handle very dark (almost black) and the basket body two-tone with a lighter stripe near the bottom, rather than a uniform honey-brown bucket?
Basket 2: the handle is very dark, almost black; the body is mostly honey-brown, and the lighter accent is a band right around the top rim (not a lighter stripe near the bottom).
Placed it. Go to Basket 3.
Basket 3: a rectangular picnic-style wicker basket with a tall center handle and a hinged lid that’s flipped open/up on one side.
Placed it. Go to Basket 4.
Basket 4: a small oval, boat-shaped wicker basket with a single arched handle that has white wrapping and a couple reddish bands near the top.
Placed it. Go to Basket 5.
Basket 5: a small rectangular wicker basket with a chunky twisted-rope handle arching over it (tight square weave, darker rim).
Placed it. Go to Basket 6.
Basket 6: a round lidded wicker basket shaped like a cat head—painted eyes/whiskers and a little nose on top, with small feet underneath.
Placed it. Go to Basket 7.
Basket 7: a rectangular basket with a single arched handle, dark green/teal woven sides, and a lighter tan rim with a scalloped/wavy trim along the top.
Placed it. Go to Basket 8.
Basket 8: a dark gray/black oval basket with a thick dark arched handle and a couple light tan/cream horizontal bands near the bottom (two-tone look).
Placed it. Go to Basket 9.
Basket 9: a tall, straight-sided cylindrical wicker basket (hamper-like) with an open top and two small loop handles near the rim—no big arched handle.
Placed it. Go to Basket 10.
Basket 10: a very shallow, wide round tray-basket with a single arched handle, and a clear spiral/coiled weave pattern on the base.
Placed it. Go to Basket 11.
Basket 11: a big round tub-shaped wicker basket with two small loop handles on the sides (no tall arch handle), in chunky tan weave with a darker band near the bottom.
Placed it. Go to Basket 12.
Basket 12: a small light-tan wicker basket with one thick arched handle, a rounded-rectangle shape, and a slightly flared rim (open top, no lid).
Placed it. Ready to submit.
